## Description

<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## AI-Generated Code Checklist

<!-- If any code was generated by Windsurf AI or other tools -->

- [ ] No `any` types used - all types are properly defined
- [ ] Server Components are default; `"use client"` only where needed
- [ ] Ant Design components properly imported (no dot notation)
- [ ] tRPC procedures validate input with Zod schemas
- [ ] Database operations use Drizzle ORM (no raw SQL)
- [ ] Authentication uses `protectedProcedure` for mutations
- [ ] Environment variables added to `src/env.js`
- [ ] TypeScript check passes: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] ESLint passes: `pnpm run lint`

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran -->

- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] E2E tests

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
